title: Woman arrested for man's murder in Pacaltsdorp
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - An alleged domestic altercation resulted in the death of a 46-year-old man from Rosedale in Pacaltsdorp on Friday 19 July.


> According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, a woman (40) was arrested shortly after the incident.


"It is alleged that the couple had an altercation when the victim sustained a stab wound to the arm. Emergency personnel responded to the incident and on arrival declared the victim deceased," said Spies.

The suspect was arrested on the scene and will remain in custody. She is expected to appear in the George Magistrate's Court on Monday 22 July on a charge of murder.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
